description: viaNexus is a financial data platform that provides market, reference, news, and related datasets through APIs. Its public site directs users to a hosted console and documentation for accessing the platform’s data services.
summary: viaNexus exposes a token-authenticated REST data API at api.blueskyapi.com and an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at vast-mcp.blueskyapi.com; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
